hooks.command: input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [[ "$file" =~ \.(ts|vue)$ ]] && pnpm eslint --fix "$file" 2>/dev/null || true

input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [[ "$file" == *"apps/docs"* ]] && { for d in packages/shared packages/sandbox packages/puppeteer; do [ ! -d "$d/dist" ] && echo "WARNING: $d/dist missing — run pnpm --filter $(basename $d) build first" && exit 2; done; } || true
